---
title: "IM Lup — Protoplanetary Disk"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    css: styles.css
lightbox: true
---

::: {#fig-imlup fig-align="center" width="650"}
![](images/im_lupi_gallery.jpg)

High-resolution image of the dusty protoplanetary disk surrounding the young star **IM Lup**, obtained with the SPHERE instrument on ESO’s Very Large Telescope. The observations reveal fine structures in the scattered light from dust grains in the outer regions of the disk.

**Credit:** ESO/H. Avenhaus et al./DARTT-S collaboration.
:::

---

# Object names

---

# Location

---

# Overview of the system

---

# General system properties

---

# Observations

---

# Disk geometry

---

# Disk morphology

---

# Morphology measurements

---

# Gas structure

---

# Evidence of planet formation

---

# Activity

---

# References
